voices.name: Bella - Professional, Bright, Warm
voices.description: This voice is warm, bright, and professional, characterized by a Standard American accent and a polished, narrative quality. It features a medium-high pitch with crisp diction and a deliberate, rhythmic pace that makes it highly intelligible and engaging for long-form listening.

voices.name: Violetta - Ringing, Bright and Joyful
voices.description: Violetta - A warm, clear, and engaging middle-aged Italien female voice. With a smooth, natural tone, this voice is perfect for narrations, audiobooks, or informative audio content. Its expressive quality makes it ideal for storytelling, while remaining professional and easy to follow.

voices.name: Monica
voices.description:
Voce femminile, circa 35 anni.
Tono: empatico e professionale.
Ritmo: vivace ma chiaro. Fluente e naturale, senza pause eccessive.
Dizione: Italiana standard (senza inflessioni regionali marcate), chiara e nitida.
Stile: Conversazionale e umano, con micro-pause naturali tra le frasi, evitando qualsiasi suono metallico o robotico.
